event: The Dragon King revering the Buddha
description: A Chinese ink and color painting on silk in a vertical scroll format. Three figures are depicted against a plain brown background. At center, a tall elegant figure in flowing robes with an elaborate hairstyle stands with a serene expression. To the lower right, a smaller, older bearded figure in darker robes bows or gestures respectfully. To the left, a small child-like attendant figure accompanies them. The painting style is refined and delicate, with fine lines and subtle coloring. A decorative border frames the scroll.

_meta.title: The Dragon King Revering the Buddha
